description: The Reference Option Description Driver component is used primarily to drive the parts that make up a Context Menu Item Source. This component along with ContextMenuItemSource is used in context menus for toggles where the toggle controls a reference like a slot or object.

fields.Reference: The reference field to compare against
fields.ForceDeselected: Forces any context menu item source to change regardless if it is deselected.
fields.Label: The string to set to the chosen label in the list of ``Options``
fields.Color: The color to set to the chosen color in the list of ``Options``
fields.Sprite: The Sprite to set to the chosen Sprite in the list of ``Options``
fields.DefaultOption: The option to set ``Label``, ``Color``, and ``Sprite`` to when ``Reference`` doesn't match any ``ReferenceTarget``s under the list of ``Options``
fields.Options: The list to search for a ``ReferenceTarget`` that matches ``Reference``. once a match is found, the option's ``Label``, ``Color``, and ``Sprite`` is used to drive this section's drive targets of ``Label``, ``Color``, and ``Sprite``.

usage: This component can be more efficient than using a bunch of Reference Equality Drivers and generating a number based on such, or using ProtoFlux for a context menu.
